breakdown: This PR fixes a bug where rewards_box in streaming passthrough wasn't being normalized, causing non-standard keys (xp, gold_pieces) from LLM responses to leak into persisted state. The fix adds a normalize_rewards_box_for_ui function that maps legacy keys to standard keys, applied in the _resolve_canonical_level_up_ui_pair function. Test coverage is excellent with a real E2E test, but the main function lacks a docstring and has minimal explicit error handling beyond coerce_int defaults.
key_changes: Added normalize_rewards_box_for_ui function to convert 'xp'→'xp_gained' and 'gold_pieces'→'gold'
Added E2E test file testing streaming passthrough normalization with messy keys
Added pop operations to remove legacy keys after normalization
